problem id: c6ac4d1d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00100100 -> 11101111
  00100010 -> 00110111
  01010011 -> 11010010
  00000011 -> 10010011
  00101011 -> 00110011
  11101111 -> 10100111
  11110000 -> 00111111
  00001110 -> 00000111

query: 00101001
predicted answer: 01111011
